mapper.select: SELECT m.user_id AS userId, m.role AS memberRole, u.username AS username, u.real_name AS realName, u.phone AS phone, o.org_name AS deptName FROM dept_daily_project_member m INNER JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = m.user_id AND u.tenant_id = m.tenant_id LEFT JOIN sys_user_org uo ON uo.tenant_id = u.tenant_id AND uo.user_id = u.id AND uo.is_main = 1 LEFT JOIN sys_org o ON o.tenant_id = u.tenant_id AND o.id = uo.org_id WHERE m.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND m.project_id = #{projectId} AND m.is_active = 1 ORDER BY CASE WHEN m.role = 'LEADER' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ASC, m.joined_at ASC, m.user_id ASC
